title: psoralidium micranthum
intro: Psoralidium micranthum, also known as smallflower fleabane, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Psoralidium micranthum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatism, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
